articles.original_title: Discover Musstir Heights: A Sustainable Oasis in Al Jabal Al Akhdar

B1.body: Musstir has launched a new project called Musstir Heights in Al Jabal Al Akhdar, Oman. The project is worth over 300 million OMR. It will have exclusive homes with great views. The area is a popular tourist spot and a beautiful natural place. The project aims to provide a high standard of living. It is part of the Mohammed Al Barwani Group's plans. The launch was announced in Muscat on 10 May 2026. The project is important for Oman's real estate and tourism. It will offer a unique living experience. The project is also focused on sustainability. It will be a great place to live and visit.

B2.title: Sustainable Oasis Unveiled
B2.body: Musstir, a real estate development company, has launched Musstir Heights, a luxury residential project in Al Jabal Al Akhdar, Oman. The OMR 300 million project aims to provide elevated living in one of Oman's most iconic natural destinations. Located in Al Jabal Al Aali, Musstir Heights is set to redefine the concept of sustainable living. The project was unveiled on May 10, 2026, in Muscat, Sultanate of Oman. This initiative is part of the Mohammed Al Barwani Group's efforts to promote eco-friendly development. The launch of Musstir Heights is significant as it showcases Oman's commitment to environmental conservation. With its unique blend of luxury and sustainability, Musstir Heights is expected to attract attention from investors and residents alike, making it a notable addition to Oman's real estate market, and a step towards a greener future.

C1.title: Musstir Heights Unveiled
C1.body: In a groundbreaking endeavour, Musstir, the real estate development arm of the Mohammed Al Barwani Group, has officially launched Musstir Heights, an opulent residential complex situated in the picturesque Al Jabal Al Akhdar region of Oman. This inaugural project, valued at over OMR 300 million, is poised to revolutionise the concept of elevated living in one of Oman's most breathtaking natural and tourism destinations. By seamlessly integrating luxury and sustainability, Musstir Heights is set to redefine the standards of high-end living, boasting an array of lavish amenities and cutting-edge infrastructure. The project's unveiling, which took place on 10 May 2026 in Muscat, Sultanate of Oman, marks a significant milestone in the country's real estate landscape. As a testament to Oman's burgeoning tourism industry, Musstir Heights is expected to attract discerning investors and residents seeking an unparalleled living experience. With its emphasis on sustainability and eco-friendliness, this exclusive residential complex is poised to become a benchmark for future developments in the region, underscoring the importance of environmental stewardship in luxury living.

articles.original_title: Invest in midwives for mother, child survival NANNM charges FG

A2.title: Help Mothers and Babies
A2.body: Health workers want more money for midwives. They help mothers and babies. The country has many deaths. Midwives can help. They need training and good pay. The health workers made this call on a special day. It is the day of the midwife. They want one million more midwives. This will help mothers and babies. The country needs more midwives. They can save lives. The health workers are warning the government. They must invest in midwives. This is important for the country.

B1.title: Invest in Midwives
B1.body: Health experts want the government to invest in midwives to reduce deaths of mothers and babies. They made this call on the 2026 International Day of the Midwife. The theme is 'One Million More Midwives'. Experts say the country needs more midwives to reduce deaths. They want the government to train and keep midwives, and improve their working conditions. This will help reduce deaths of mothers and babies during childbirth. The government needs to act fast to expand the number of skilled midwives. This is important for the health of mothers and babies in the country. It is a big problem that needs a solution.

B2.title: Invest in Midwives
B2.body: To mark the 2026 International Day of the Midwife, health stakeholders are calling for increased investment in midwife training, retention, and welfare. The theme of the day is 'One Million More Midwives'. They warn that without more skilled birth attendants, the country cannot reduce deaths among mothers and newborns. Nigeria needs to rapidly expand its skilled birth workforce to achieve this goal. The stakeholders, including the Nigerian National Association of Midwives, are putting pressure on the government to take action. They believe that investing in midwives is crucial for improving the health and wellbeing of mothers and children. This investment will have a significant impact on reducing maternal and newborn deaths. The government is being urged to prioritize the training and welfare of midwives. By doing so, the country can make progress towards reducing deaths and improving healthcare outcomes. This is a critical issue that requires immediate attention and action.

C1.title: Midwives Investment Crucial
C1.body: To commemorate the 2026 International Day of the Midwife, themed 'One Million More Midwives', key health stakeholders have underscored the imperative of bolstering investment in midwives' training, retention, and welfare. This clarion call, emanating from the Nigerian National Association of Nurses and Midwives, serves as a stark reminder that a significant reduction in maternal and newborn mortality rates is inextricably linked to a substantial expansion of the skilled birth workforce. The dearth of skilled midwives has been identified as a critical impediment to progress in this realm, with far-reaching consequences for maternal and child health. Consequently, stakeholders are urging the government to prioritize the training and deployment of additional midwives, thereby ensuring that expectant mothers and their newborns receive the requisite care, ultimately mitigating the risk of mortality. This initiative is pivotal in the quest to enhance healthcare outcomes, particularly in resource-constrained settings. By bolstering the midwifery workforce, Nigeria can make significant strides in reducing maternal and newborn deaths, aligning with global health imperatives.

A2.title: Stock Market News Today
A2.body: The stock market has key levels. If the price is high, it is good. If it is low, it is bad. The market can go up or down. It can change near some points. These points are called support and resistance. The market can be volatile or trend. It can also stay the same. The range is important. If it is narrow, the market can change fast. If it is wide, the market stays the same. This is important for traders. They need to know these levels. They can help them make good decisions.

B1.title: Stock Market Trends
B1.body: The stock market has key levels that help traders make decisions. If the price stays above a certain point, it is a bullish sign. If it stays below, it is a bearish sign. The price may change direction near certain levels. If it moves further, it may change direction again. When a level is broken, it often changes its role. A broken resistance becomes a new support, and a broken support becomes a new resistance. The market may become volatile or trend strongly if the range is narrow. A wide range may mean the market stays sideways. Understanding these levels can help traders make better decisions. They can also help traders predict market trends and make informed choices.

B2.title: Market Trends and Key Levels
B2.body: On May 11, 2026, market analysts observed key levels for the NIFTY index. A bullish bias is indicated if the candle stays above the pivot point, while a bearish bias is shown if it remains below. The price may reverse near Resistance 1 or Support 1, and if it moves further, the next potential reversal zone is near Resistance 2 or Support 2. Broken support or resistance levels often reverse their roles. A narrow range between Resistance 2 and Support 2 may lead to market volatility or a strong trend, while a wide range may result in a sideways market. Understanding these levels can help traders make informed decisions. It is essential to consult with a financial advisor before making any trading or investment decisions, as trading and investing in the stock market involves risk. By analyzing these key levels, traders can develop a strategy to master their daily trading. The information provided is for educational purposes only.

C1.title: Nifty Market Trends
C1.body: The Nifty market exhibits a propensity for trend reversals near pivotal levels, with the candle's position relative to the pivot point indicative of a bullish or bearish bias. Resistance and support levels, denoted as Resistance 1 and 2 and Support 1 and 2, serve as potential reversal zones, with the market's trajectory influenced by the breach of these levels. The interplay between support and resistance is nuanced, with broken levels often assuming the opposite role, thereby informing subsequent market movements. A narrow range between Resistance 2 and Support 2 may precipitate market volatility or a strong trend, whereas a wide range is more likely to result in a sideways market. Understanding these dynamics is crucial for traders seeking to navigate the complexities of the Nifty market. By grasping these concepts, traders can refine their strategies and make more informed decisions. The importance of consulting with a SEBI-registered financial advisor cannot be overstated, as trading and investing in the stock market entails inherent risks. Ultimately, a thorough comprehension of market trends and dynamics is essential for success in the Nifty market, and traders must remain vigilant and adaptable to navigate its intricacies.

articles.original_title: 1998 Pokhran nuclear tests reflected India's scientific excellence: PM on National Technology Day

A2.title: India's Big Nuclear Test
A2.body: India had a big nuclear test in 1998. It was in Pokhran. The test was important. It showed India's science skills. The Prime Minister talks about it. He is happy with India's scientists. They did a great job. The test was a big success. It was on May 11, 1998. India is proud of its scientists. They worked hard. The test was a big step for India. It showed India can do big things.

B1.title: India Celebrates Tech Day
B1.body: On National Technology Day, PM Modi remembered India's 1998 Pokhran nuclear tests. The tests showed India's scientific skills and ability to work alone. This event was important for India's growth. It happened on May 11, 1998. The tests were a big success and made India proud. The country's scientists did a great job. India's self-reliance and scientific excellence were on display. The PM praised the scientists and their work. This day is a reminder of India's progress and achievements. It inspires people to work hard and innovate. India's technology is getting better every day.

B2.title: India Celebrates Nuclear Tests
B2.body: On National Technology Day, Prime Minister Modi remembered India's 1998 Pokhran nuclear tests, highlighting the country's scientific capabilities and self-reliance. The tests, conducted on May 11, 1998, demonstrated India's expertise in nuclear technology. This significant event showcased the nation's ability to develop complex technologies without foreign assistance. The Prime Minister's tribute acknowledges the contributions of Indian scientists and engineers who made this achievement possible. The Pokhran tests marked a major milestone in India's history, underscoring its commitment to scientific progress and independence. By commemorating this event, India reinforces its pursuit of innovation and technological advancement, inspiring future generations to strive for excellence. The celebration of National Technology Day serves as a reminder of the importance of science and technology in driving the country's growth and development, with the Prime Minister's message emphasizing the need for continued innovation and self-reliance.

C1.title: Nuclear Tests Marked India's Excellence
C1.body: On National Technology Day, Prime Minister Modi paid tribute to the 1998 Pokhran nuclear tests, underscoring the pivotal role this milestone played in showcasing India's burgeoning scientific prowess and unwavering commitment to self-reliance. The tests, conducted on May 11, 1998, in the Pokhran test range in Rajasthan, were a testament to the country's unrelenting pursuit of technological advancement and its determination to assert its presence on the global stage. This historic event not only highlighted India's scientific excellence but also underscored its resolve to harness technology for the betterment of its citizens. The commemoration of this day serves as a poignant reminder of the nation's tryst with destiny, its unyielding spirit, and its relentless drive to emerge as a beacon of innovation. By celebrating this achievement, India reaffirms its commitment to fostering a culture of scientific inquiry and technological innovation, thereby ensuring a brighter future for generations to come. The impact of the Pokhran tests resonates deeply, symbolizing a watershed moment in India's history, one that continues to inspire and motivate its people.

articles.original_title: 1998 Pokhran nuclear tests reflected India's scientific excellence: PM on National Technology Day - The Hindu

A2.title: India Celebrates Technology Day

The Prime Minister greets the nation. He says the tests were a big success. India is happy about its science progress. The day is for new ideas. It is for growth and innovation. India wants to be a leader in technology. The country is working hard. It is a special day for India.

B1.title: India Celebrates Tech Day
B1.body: India celebrated National Technology Day. The day remembers the 1998 nuclear tests in Pokhran. Prime Minister Narendra Modi greeted the nation. He said the tests showed India's scientific excellence. The tests changed India's position in global politics. They made India a major player. The day focuses on using technology for inclusive growth. It aims to help everyone. The government wants responsible innovation. This will help the country develop. People are working together to achieve this goal. India is moving forward with new technologies and ideas.

B2.title: India Celebrates Tech Day
B2.body: On National Technology Day, Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi acknowledged the country's scientific achievements, particularly the 1998 Pokhran nuclear tests. The tests, which took place in the town of Pokhran, showcased India's expertise in nuclear technology. This significant event altered India's position in global politics, earning it recognition as a major player. The day is observed to commemorate the nuclear tests and highlight the importance of technology in India's growth. Modi extended greetings to the nation, emphasizing the need for responsible innovation to drive inclusive development. The focus is on leveraging technology to improve lives and promote sustainable progress. India's scientific community is hailed for its contributions, and the country continues to strive for excellence in various fields. The occasion serves as a reminder of India's capabilities and its commitment to innovation. The nation's technological advancements have far-reaching implications, shaping its future and solidifying its global standing.

C1.title: Nuclear Tests Showcase India's Excellence
C1.body: The 1998 Pokhran nuclear tests epitomized India's burgeoning scientific prowess, catapulting the nation to an esteemed position on the global stage. This pivotal event, which transpired on May 11, 1998, was a testament to India's unwavering dedication to technological advancement. Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently extolled the virtues of this landmark occasion, underscoring its profound impact on the country's stature in international politics. The successful execution of the nuclear tests was a culmination of meticulous planning, unwavering perseverance, and unrelenting passion, ultimately culminating in a resounding triumph. As India commemorates National Technology Day, the nation is reminded of the paramount importance of responsible innovation, underscoring the need for inclusive growth and sustainable development. The Pokhran tests served as a watershed moment, irreversibly altering the trajectory of India's scientific landscape, and cementing its reputation as a burgeoning technological powerhouse. This milestone event continues to inspire future generations, fostering an environment conducive to innovation and progress. The nation's technological prowess has been a cornerstone of its development, with the Pokhran tests being a seminal moment in this journey.

articles.original_title: Barcelona seal back‐to‐back La Liga crowns with 2–0 Clasico win that leaves Real Madrid trophyless

A2.title: Barcelona Wins La Liga
A2.body: Barcelona won the Spanish league. They beat Real Madrid 2-0. The game was in Barcelona. It happened on May 11. Barcelona is happy. They won the league title. This is their 29th title. Real Madrid is sad. They did not win a trophy. Barcelona played well. They scored two goals. Real Madrid scored none. Barcelona is the best team now.

B1.title: Barcelona Wins La Liga Title
B1.body: Barcelona won the Spanish league title by beating Real Madrid 2-0. This was their 29th title. The game was played in Barcelona. The team is very happy. They worked hard to win. The win means they are the best team in Spain. They won the title two years in a row. Real Madrid did not win any titles this year. Barcelona's fans are celebrating. The team's players are happy and proud. They played well and won the game. The title is important for the team and their fans. It shows they are a great team.

B2.title: Barcelona Wins La Liga Title
B2.body: Barcelona has secured their 29th Spanish league title after defeating Real Madrid 2-0 in the Clasico. The match took place on May 11th in Barcelona, where the home team dominated the game. This win marks Barcelona's second consecutive La Liga title, leaving Real Madrid without a trophy. The team's victory is a significant achievement, showcasing their skills and teamwork. The win also highlights the intense rivalry between the two teams. Barcelona's success is a result of their consistent performance throughout the season. The team's players and coaches deserve credit for their hard work and dedication. This title win is a testament to Barcelona's strength and dominance in Spanish football. The team will look to continue their winning streak in upcoming matches. With this win, Barcelona has solidified its position as a top team in La Liga.

C1.title: Barcelona Claims La Liga Title
C1.body: Barcelona has successfully defended their Spanish league title, garnering their 29th championship after a decisive 2-0 victory over arch-rivals Real Madrid in the highly anticipated Clasico. This triumph not only underscores Barcelona's dominance in the league but also leaves Real Madrid without a trophy, exacerbating the disappointment for their fans. The win is a testament to Barcelona's unwavering dedication and unrelenting pursuit of excellence, as they navigated the challenges of the season with finesse and poise. The implications of this victory are multifaceted, influencing not only the teams' standings but also the trajectory of their future endeavors. As the season draws to a close, Barcelona's accomplishment serves as a poignant reminder of the team's prowess and their capacity to perform under pressure. With this win, Barcelona solidifies its position as a formidable force in Spanish football, leaving an indelible mark on the sport. The team's strategy and skillful execution were pivotal in securing the title, and their fans are ecstatic about the outcome. The victory is a culmination of the team's hard work and perseverance, and it will undoubtedly have a lasting impact on the team's morale and future performances.

articles.original_title: Amit Shah reviews preparednessto deal with floods, heatwaves

A2.title: Amit Shah Reviews Flood Plans
A2.body: Amit Shah is the Home Minister. He had a meeting on Sunday. He talked about floods and heatwaves. He wants to keep people safe. He said we must be ready. There are big lakes in India. He wants to watch them. This will help us know when floods come. We can save people then. Amit Shah wants zero casualties. He means no one should die. This is a big plan. It will help India. The meeting was in New Delhi. It was on May 10.

B1.title: India Prepares for Floods
B1.body: Union Home Minister Amit Shah had a meeting on Sunday to review India's preparedness for floods and heatwaves. He wants to achieve zero-casualty disaster management. At least 60 lakes will be included in an early-warning system. This system will help to warn people before floods happen. The meeting was held in New Delhi. Amit Shah underlined the importance of being prepared for natural disasters. He wants to make sure that people are safe during floods and heatwaves. The plan is to save lives and reduce damage. India is prone to floods and heatwaves during the summer months. The government is taking steps to prepare for these disasters.

B2.title: India Prepares for Floods, Heatwaves
B2.body: On Sunday, Union Home Minister Amit Shah held a high-level meeting to review India's preparedness for potential floods and heatwaves. Shah emphasized the need to achieve zero-casualty disaster management. He suggested that at least 60 lakes be included in the plan to develop an early-warning system. This system would help to mitigate the effects of natural disasters. The meeting was held in New Delhi and was attended by top officials. Shah's efforts aim to minimize the impact of floods and heatwaves on communities. By developing an effective early-warning system, India can reduce the risk of casualties and damage to property. This is a crucial step in disaster management, and the government is taking proactive measures to address the issue. The plan is expected to be implemented soon, and it will be closely monitored by the government.

C1.title: Amit Shah Reviews Flood Preparedness
C1.body: On Sunday, Union Home Minister Amit Shah convened a high-level meeting to assess the country's readiness to mitigate the impact of impending floods and heatwaves, emphasizing the imperative of striving for zero-casualty disaster management. Shah underscored the necessity of incorporating at least 60 lakes into the plan to develop a robust early-warning system, thereby enabling the authorities to respond promptly and effectively to potential disasters. This initiative is particularly pertinent in the context of India's vulnerability to extreme weather events, which have been exacerbated by climate change. By prioritizing disaster management, the government aims to minimize the loss of life and property, ultimately contributing to the well-being and safety of its citizens. The implementation of this plan is expected to have a profound impact on the country's ability to cope with natural disasters, and its success will be contingent upon the collaborative efforts of various stakeholders. The meeting highlighted the importance of proactive measures in disaster management, and the government's commitment to this endeavor is a testament to its dedication to the welfare of its people. Furthermore, the development of an early-warning system will facilitate the evacuation of people from high-risk areas, thereby reducing the risk of casualties. The government's efforts to enhance its disaster management capabilities are laudable, and it is anticipated that these initiatives will yield positive outcomes in the future.
